title: desmodium procumbens var. exiguum
intro: Desmodium procumbens var. exiguum is a variant of the Desmodium procumbens plant, a perennial legume native to North America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Desmodium procumbens var. exiguum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and discomfort, and support the immune system. It is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and may also be used in infusions and poultices for topical application.
